description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners, featuring a glossy black finish. The back panel houses a prominent triple-lens camera array and a flash, all arranged in a square module at the top left corner, along with a centrally placed, glossy Apple logo. The sides are thin and appear to be made of metal, with subtle button placements visible along the edges. The front is dominated by a large, black glass touchscreen with a small notch at the top, likely for the front-facing camera and sensors. The device is compact and slim, typical of contemporary high-end mobile phones. Its overall design is minimalist, with no visible case or external accessories.
description: A sleek, black modern smartphone with a triple-lens camera array and a glossy finish, featuring a large front touchscreen and minimalistic design.
description_view_0: The back view shows a glossy black surface with a triple-lens camera and flash in a square module at the top left, and a central Apple logo.
description_view_1: The left edge view reveals the slim profile of the phone, with subtle button outlines visible along the edge.
description_view_2: The front view displays the large, black glass touchscreen with a small notch at the top, and no visible buttons or content on the screen.
description_view_3: The right edge view highlights the thinness of the device and possible button placements, mirroring the left edge.
attribute_brand_logo: A glossy black Apple logo is centered on the back panel.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen is blank or turned off, with no visible content or interface elements.
attribute_camera_placement: There is a triple camera array and flash arranged in a square module at the top left corner on the back.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are subtly visible along the left and right edges, likely for volume and power functions.
